Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I was wondering, y'think we could pick up some new moves from these fighting games?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Can you imagine if we had, like, a super badass special attack?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}What're you sayin'? Who doesn't dream about bein' a badass?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Badass moves are more important than you think, y'know. 'Specially if you're tryin' to impress other kids.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}And besides, our power's gotta come from the heart, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}That's why I think comics and games'll give us a little inspiration.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Seein' those heroes in action pumps me up and helps me picture my fights better, know what I mean?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Ahhh but hey, maybe someday someone'll make a game about our adventure![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I mean, we have gone around saving people, like at the monorail.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}We kicked ass on that one, didn't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Makin' a comeback after hangin' on by a thread... It was like a freakin' movie, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Though I'd say you really stole most of the show.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Maybe I'll be the cool one next time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Ah, I admit, I wasn't on my game before...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But next time, I'm totally gonna knock it outta the park![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Whoa-ho, look who's talkin' like a leader![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Heh, I'm stealin' the spotlight next time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}But you better watch out—I'm stealing the spotlight next time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Oh, I'm gonna make you eat those words! Just you wait![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Y'know, I really do wanna do my best.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I got a lotta good things goin' for me. I've been really waitin' for somethin' like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I feel like my life's finally starting to go somewhere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}And I don't plan on lettin' you get the best of me just yet, ya hear?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}If you go screwin' around, I might just have to take over as leader![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Well, let's quit yappin' and play some games![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Our next enemy can wait. You and me are throwin' down for the whole enchilada![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Oh yeah!? It's your funeral, buddy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Yeah, take that! Die die die die die![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I left after an intense game with Junpei.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_POWERUP_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}The Strength of Junpei's Persona, {f 0 1 1}Hermes{f 0 1 27}, was raised by 3.[n]{f 1 1}
